title: Rocky Exoplanets
description: What are the primary types of rocky planets? What kind of interiors and atmospheres do super-Earth planets develop?

title: Magma Oceans
description: How do magma oceans interact with early atmospheres? What can lava exoplanets reveal about planetary evolution?

title: Origins of Life
description: What were the conditions on the earliest Earth? How frequent are worlds amenable to prebiotic chemistry?
